sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime, id UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT tid(), EXTRACT(DAY FROM (SELECT MIN(event_time) FROM test_dates)) AS min_day FROM test_dates GROUP BY min_day;
SELECT tid(), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_dates GROUP BY month HAVING count > 0;
SELECT tid(), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CONCAT(CAST(event_time AS String), ' 00:00:00')) AS year FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT tid(), event_time, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_time) AS hour FROM test_dates WHERE EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_time) = 1 ORDER BY hour;
SELECT tid(), MAX(EXTRACT(SECOND FROM event_time)) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1 GROUP BY id;
SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM IFNULL((SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE id IS NULL), toDateTime('2000-01-01 00:00:00'))) AS fallback_month;
SELECT tid(), event_time, EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_time) + EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_time) AS day_plus_hour FROM test_dates;
SELECT tid(), EXTRACT(DAY FROM toDate(event_time)) AS day, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY day HAVING day > 1;
